title: Army of the Damned
setting: Innistrad (Magic: The Gathering / D&D 5e fan module)
synopsis:
Adventure Background
Humanitys Peril
The archangel Avacyn, the central figure of the Church
of Avacyn and the main conduit of holy magic on the
plane, hasnt been seen over the last few seasons, and her
absence shows. Since Avacyn has disappeared, prayers
have not spared remote villages from werewolf attacks as
they once did. Holy symbols have not stopped vampires
from preying on travelers in the high mountain passes.
The dead are not protected from tampering by ghoulcallers
and flesh-animating alchemists called skaberen. With the
power of holy magic waning, humanity is being pushed
into a corner by an encroaching darkness that threatens
to consume them.
Only a select few elders in the Church, including
Mikaeus, the ruling Lunarch, know what has happened
to Avacyn; the archangel is trapped within the Helvault
after a desperate struggle with the demon Griselbrand. To
save Avacyn (if she is even alive) would require shattering
the Helvault and releasing hundreds of years worth of
captured demons imprisoned within the silver prison with
her, a risky move that may doom the plane utterly.
One Hope
Mikaeus and a handful of his most trusted advisors
hatched a desperate plan: they believe t...
tone: Gothic horror, zombie apocalypse, mystery, survival
current_scene: The party travels the dark roads of Stensia toward the isolated village of Shadowgrange. Strange lights flicker in the distance. The dead have begun to stir.
dm_notes: Gothic horror adventure set in Innistrad. Emphasize dread, isolation, and the gradual revelation that something ancient has been unleashed. The main villain is a ghoulcaller raising an army of undead. Use maps prefixed with aotd-. Start with aotd-Stensia Map.png for the overworld.

key_npcs.name: Flora Mayweather
key_npcs.personality: Devout, caring, desperate for help. Has a quest for the party.

key_npcs.name: Captain Levi
key_npcs.personality: Gruff, practical, deeply worried about the village defenses.

key_npcs.name: Eckhardt Sheck
key_npcs.personality: Nervous, talkative, knows all the local gossip.

key_npcs.name: Magda Botler
key_npcs.personality: Friendly on the surface. Has a cursed item.
key_npcs.secret: Secretly a Skirsdag cultist worshipping demons

key_npcs.name: Marcus Ritter
key_npcs.personality: Stoic, strong, has a personal stake in ending the undead threat. Has a quest.

key_npcs.name: Silvia Wintsch
key_npcs.personality: Sharp-tongued, skilled, supplies the village hunters. Has a quest.

key_npcs.name: Shilgengar
key_npcs.personality: Ancient, manipulative, seeks to use the undead army for his own ends.

locations.name: Stensia Road
locations.description: The treacherous mountain road through Kruin Pass into Stensia. Werewolves, vampires, and restless dead haunt this route.

locations.name: Shadowgrange
locations.description: A bleak, isolated village in Stensia. Besieged by undead rising from the surrounding countryside.

locations.name: Shadowgrange Chapel
locations.description: The village chapel. Flora Mayweather leads prayers here, though divine magic has been weakening.

locations.name: Sheck Inn
locations.description: The village inn run by Eckhardt Sheck. The party base of operations.

locations.name: Mauer Estate
locations.description: An abandoned noble estate on the outskirts. Vampires have claimed it. Dark secrets buried here.

locations.name: The Farbog
locations.description: A treacherous swamp east of Shadowgrange. Ancient evil stirs here — source of the undead plague.

locations.name: Ghoulcaller Sanctum
locations.description: The lair of the ghoulcaller behind the Army of the Damned. Final confrontation.

chapters.title: Into Stensia
chapters.summary:
Part 1: Into Stensia
The adventure begins with the player characters on the
road, traveling from Thraben to Shadowgrange (MAP).
The journey took them through the province Gavony into
Stensia via the Kruin Pass, a treacherous pass through the
mountain range called Geier Reach, which cuts off Stensia
from the rest of the provinces. The characters journeyed
through Stensias inner valley and now cross Hofsaddel
pass into the outer valley where Shadowgrange resides.
Before you begin, have your players introduce their
characters. Let them explain why their characters are
making the journey from Thra...

chapters.title: Shadowgrange
chapters.summary:
Part 2: Shadowgrange
Shadowgrange (MAP) is one of the oldest human
settlements in Stensia. Most of the villagers are farmers,
the majority being shepherds. The rest of the villagers
work in trades that support the farmers by spinning wool,
weaving clothes, shoeing horses, milling grain, and the
like. Some merchants move goods from Shadowgrange to
other settlements such as Lammas, but shipments move
less frequently these days as the roads become more
dangerous.
In the last two years, Shadowgrange has experienced
a swell of new citizens that sought refuge behind the
villages fortifications. Most...
chapters.milestone: Discover the source of the undead (Level 3)

chapters.title: Night of the Dead
chapters.summary:
Part 3: Night of the Dead
This chapter begins shortly after the adventurers find the
Strionic Resonator in the previous chapter. If the players
do not have any intention of locating the artifact, or they
still have other intended goals in town, you may choose to
start this chapter after the players have had sufficient time
to rest, explore Shadowgrange, and restock on supplies.
Undead Menace
Events are unfolding beyond the scope of the characters
activities: an army of undead are currently on a murderous
rampage, laying waste to all the settlements in their way.
Shadowgrange is their ultimate ...

chapters.title: Into the Farbog
chapters.summary:
Part 4: Into the Farbog
In this part of the adventure, the characters travel to
Mauer Estate, located at the northern edge of Stensias
outer valley. To do so, they will need to journey through a
large bog that divides the southern part of the valley from
its northern tip.
Depending on which NPCs the characters met and
which quests or clues they picked up, some or all the
following information might be known to them:
 Priestess Flora wants the characters to travel to Mauer
Estate and uncover the source of the undead.
 Rinelda Smit can confirm that Siegfried is the creator
of the undead armies a...

chapters.title: The Perfect Storm
chapters.summary:
Chapter 5: The Perfect
Sixty miles north of Shadowgrange, nestled in a clearing at
the center of a grove of live oak trees deep within northern
Stensia, stands Mauer Estate. The mansion is one of the
oldest buildings in the region, its foundation dating back
thousands of years to a holy sect of paladins that brought
the Light to Innistrad long before even Avacyn. Since then,
countless occupants have claimed Mauer Estate as their
home, modifying the grounds to suit their needs.
Siegfried is the estates current owner and uses it as
his base of operations. Ever since he fled Shadowgrange
in the w...
chapters.milestone: Defeat the ghoulcaller and end the Army of the Damned

quests.title: End the Army of the Damned
quests.description: Discover who is raising the undead army and stop them before Shadowgrange falls.

quests.title: The Missing Faithful
quests.description: Several villagers have gone missing near the old cemetery.

quests.title: Silver and Steel
quests.description: Forge blessed silver weapons effective against undead.

quests.title: Defend the Walls
quests.description: Reinforce village defenses before the nightly undead attacks overwhelm the militia.

quests.title: Arrows of Light
quests.description: Retrieve components from the dangerous forest for blessed ammunition.

adventure_hooks:
Adventure Hooks
You can let players invent their own reasons for visiting
Shadowgrange, or they can use the following backgrounds
as an easy way to create characters with compelling ties to
the events of Army of the Damned.
Below is a list of bonds that applies to any background
that players select or create. You can replace or augment
some or all of the options in your chosen background with
one or more of the bonds.
BOND (D8)
1. The Church of Avacyn has hired you to make contact
with Katarina Brunn, a musical prodigy living in
Shadowgrange, whom they have not heard from in
months. You must find her and/or retrieve an artifact
that was under her care.
2. A letter has arrived summoning you to Shadowgrange.
Your cousin, Siegfried Reinholdt, has fled from
his home in Shadowgrange under myste...

key_monsters.name: Skaab Goliath
key_monsters.description: Massive undead stitched from multiple corpses.

magic_items.name: Avacyn Collar
magic_items.description: A holy symbol that wards against undead.

magic_items.name: Moonsilver Spear
magic_items.description: A blessed spear effective against werewolves and undead.

magic_items.name: Ghoulcaller Bell
magic_items.description: A cursed bell that can command undead.

magic_items.name: Elbrus the Binding Blade
magic_items.description: A legendary cursed weapon that transforms its wielder.

magic_items.name: Shapeshifter Blade
magic_items.description: A blade that adapts to its target.
